embeds.title: I'm entitled to my opinion
embeds.description: I'm entitled to my opinion (or I have a right to my opinion) is an informal fallacy in which someone dismisses arguments against their position by asserting that they have a right to hold their own particular viewpoint. The statement exemplifies a red herring or thought-terminating cliché. The falla

stuff like marvelous cuisine from karen and chain from ghelot cant be frozen while in use
